mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 265 in the CPIAUCSL index signals central bank inaction, leading to real rate compression and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite inflationary signal, or CPIAUCSL fails to predict returns in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL indicate tightening monetary policy amid inflation, creating headwinds for equity valuations and negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: Interaction term fails to explain returns in 3-year rolling windows (Rank IC < 0.05) or SPX shows positive returns in 70%+ of co-movement cases.

mechanism_narrative: A 0.3pp monthly decline in UNRATE signals tightening labor markets, boosting corporate margins and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances with labor market tightening signals, or UNRATE fails to predict returns in 1-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising GDP growth (GDPC1) from the prior quarter indicates expanding economic activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 fails to predict returns in 3-year rolling windows (Rank IC < 0.03) or 60-day forward returns show negative correlation with GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production (INDPRO) signals stronger corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO fails to predict returns in 2-year rolling windows (Rank IC < 0.05) or SPX shows negative returns in 60%+ of instances with rising industrial output.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in housing starts (HOUST) and real sales (RSAFS) indicates robust consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term fails to explain returns in 3-year rolling windows (Rank IC < 0.03) or SPX shows negative returns in 70%+ of co-movement cases.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) above 140k signals labor market strength, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances with payroll growth above 140k, or PAYEMS fails to predict returns in 1-year rolling windows.
